opportunities.description:

opportunities.title: [HIRING] Help with my Uber account 15$/hr
opportunities.description:
[HIRING] Help with my Uber account 15$/hr

Hi I am currently a uber eats and doordash delivery driver and I heard people can tweak your account to make you get the best orders and high paying offers, if anyon knows how to do this I will pay good money and please just shoot a message and no it is not illegal I just think the AI got me used to bad offers which sucks cuz I have bills, anyways please shoot a dm and also this is my second account I will check messages in the morning or after work thank you so much   submitted by   /u/certifiedomar13 [link]   [comments]
